# stalwart_domain (Resource)

Manages a Stalwart email domain (the `Domain` JMAP object).

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "stalwart_domain" "example" {
  name        = "example.com"
  description = "Primary mail domain"
  catchall    = "postmaster@example.com"
  aliases     = ["example.net"]
}

# Import an existing domain by its name:
# terraform import stalwart_domain.example example.com
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Fully-qualified domain name, e.g. `example.com`.

### Optional

- `acme_provider_id` (String) ACME provider id used when `certificate_management` is `Automatic`.
- `aliases` (Set of String) Additional domain names that are aliases of this domain. Defaults to an empty list.
- `allow_relaying` (Boolean) Whether to allow relaying for non-local recipients. Defaults to `false`.
- `catchall` (String) Catch-all email address that receives messages addressed to unknown local recipients (maps to the `catchAllAddress` field).
- `certificate_management` (String) TLS certificate management mode: `Manual` or `Automatic`. Defaults to `Manual`.
- `description` (String) Human-readable description of the domain.
- `directory_id` (String) Opaque id of the authentication directory used to resolve accounts in this domain. When omitted the server uses the global directory.
- `dkim_management` (String) DKIM key management mode: `Automatic` or `Manual`. Defaults to `Automatic`.
- `dns_management` (String) DNS record management mode: `Manual` or `Automatic`. Defaults to `Manual`.
- `dns_origin` (String) DNS origin (zone root) used when `dns_management` is `Automatic`.
- `dns_server_id` (String) DNS server id used when `dns_management` is `Automatic`.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether this domain is enabled. Defaults to `true`.
- `publish_records` (Set of String) Set of DNS record types the server should automatically publish when `dns_management` is `Automatic`. Valid values: `dkim`, `tlsa`, `spf`, `mx`, `dmarc`, `srv`, `mtaSts`, `tlsRpt`, `caa`, `autoConfig`, `autoConfigLegacy`, `autoDiscover`.
- `report_address` (String) Address to receive DMARC, TLS-RPT and CAA reports for this domain (maps to `reportAddressUri`). Defaults to `mailto:postmaster`.
- `subaddressing` (String) Sub-addressing (plus addressing) mode: `Enabled` or `Disabled`. Defaults to `Enabled`.
- `subject_alternative_names` (Set of String) Additional subject alternative names (SANs) to include in the TLS certificate when `certificate_management` is `Automatic`.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) Creation timestamp of the domain.
- `dns_zone_file` (String) Current DNS zone data the server expects to be published for the domain.
- `id` (String) Opaque server-assigned identifier of the domain.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
# Import by domain name (preferred):
terraform import stalwart_domain.example example.com

# Import by opaque server-assigned id:
# terraform import stalwart_domain.example <opaque-id>
```
